description: India Book (IB) IV,75 (ח80). Letter from Abū Naṣr b. Avraham, in Alexandria, to Ḥalfon b. Netanel ha-Levi. Dating: February 1141 CE. In Judaeo-Arabic. This was written after Ḥalfon departed from Alexandria together with Yehuda ha-Levi. (Information from India Book 4.)
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מאלכסנדריה. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
